A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

where can i find all morning program songs in mp3?

Tech · asked by user [] · 2007-08-24 · 10 answers
mangala arati, tulasi, nrsimha, guru puja...
like we chant it in the temple not strange tunes.
user [40] · 2007-08-24
This is a player that you download and it plays audio of the morning program on your computer

http://downloads.zdnet.com/download.aspx?&amp;compid=46353&amp;docid=227819
user [19] · 2007-08-24
too bad it is for windows only. :(
user [2] · 2007-08-24
cannot run in linux with wine either...
user [40] · 2007-08-24
you rebels : )
user [19] · 2007-08-24
it is for a friend who has a mac too. i have prabhupada singing the melodies they are not useful for learning the songs because the tunes he sings are different.
user [2] · 2007-08-25
I will log in to my long-forgotten xp box and see what it is. I read something about a flash file...
user [19] · 2007-08-25
nooooo, i just want plain mp3s!!!
user [40] · 2007-08-25
what about this I found it the other day

http://www.mahamantra.it/

it has HEAPS of mp3s for download. There are also multiple versions of the same songs

you might find what you are looking for
user [2] · 2007-08-25
abhiram, juicy opportunity to use command alias mp3s, he he
user [2] · 2008-05-18
http://www.iskconmedia.com/mp3/
look for "temple program"
click on the black arrow at the right of the song to download it.
